response.justification: The candidate is a strong, versatile senior engineer, but his profile does not match this role's mandatory requirements. His hands-on C++ experience is limited to roughly six months at National Instruments in 2014-2015 plus a thesis project, far short of the required 5-10 years of recent Windows C++ development. He shows no SQL Server or Oracle experience (MySQL/MongoDB only) and no fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain exposure; RIDE Capital is adjacent fintech at best. His strengths in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang do not transfer to this highly specialized C++ capital-markets engagement.
strengths: Broad senior full-stack experience across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems
Low-latency, high-throughput systems work (millions of HTTP requests/sec) showing strong performance engineering fundamentals
Solid CI/CD, DevOps, and testing culture, plus open-source and teaching contributions indicating good communication skills
concerns: C++ experience is minimal and dated (~6 months in 2014-2015), versus the mandatory 5-10 years on Windows
No fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain experience
No evidence of SQL Server or Oracle proficiency, and Summit/Kafka/Python desirables are absent

key_factors.factor: No capital markets / fixed income domain
